# Tooltip

Use `Tooltip` for short explanatory text on hover or focus when the content should stay supplemental.

## When to Use

- Icon-only buttons and ambiguous affordances
- Small hints and keyboard shortcut explanations
- Secondary metadata that should not always be visible

## Wraps

- `reka-ui` tooltip primitives

## What Shadcn Adds

- Styled tooltip content and shared provider/content conventions

## Installation

```bash
pnpm dlx shadcn-vue@latest add tooltip
```

## Example Patterns

- Vanilla: tooltip on an icon button
- Contextual: toolbar hints and dense admin interfaces

## Related Components

- `hover-card`, `button`, `toolbar`
